sections.heading: Pearls
sections.content: The NCCN guidelines for hepatobiliary cancers are organized into separate guidelines for hepatocellular carcinoma and biliary tract cancers, indicating distinct clinical management pathways for these entities.

cards.text: The NCCN guidelines for hepatobiliary cancers are organized into separate guidelines for hepatocellular carcinoma and biliary tract cancers, indicating distinct clinical management pathways for these entities.
